query:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN is_verified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS verification_rate_pct
FROM employees WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT employee_id FROM requests);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) AS employees_with_comments,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) / 162, 1) AS pct_of_participants
FROM requests
WHERE comment IS NOT NULL AND comment != '' AND request_type = 'vacation' AND status = 'pending';

SELECT ROUND(AVG(date_count), 1) AS avg_days_per_request
FROM (
  SELECT r.id, COUNT(*) AS date_count
  FROM requests r
  JOIN request_dates rd ON rd.request_id = r.id
  WHERE r.request_type = 'vacation' AND r.status = 'pending'
  GROUP BY r.id
) t;
